purpose: First-class, automatable form of the lifecycle evaluation ladder (correctness -> local A/B -> whole-decode W==D -> policy). The lifecycle-search loop (a separate, future project) generates candidates and drives this evaluator; this contract is evaluator-only (it does not generate or prune).

how_to_register_a_candidate.rungs: ordered list of {rung, runner, ...}; runners: runtime_overhead (clean W==D), q8_audit (baseline-vs-q8 W==D), ab_script (wrap an existing tile A/B), flash_l_local (built-in FLASH_L local A/B), q8_dnll_historical (correctness from artifact)
how_to_register_a_candidate.thresholds: inherit thresholds_default or override per candidate

how_a_candidate_is_run.isolation: each rung is an isolated subprocess with candidate env set in the child only (getenv is @cache'd; never mutate env in-process)
how_a_candidate_is_run.clock: clean W==D runs AUTO clock (promotion authority); clock-pinning (extra/qk_clock_pin.py) is used ONLY in diagnostic local rungs and always restored to auto

_verdict_interpretation_comment: Keys MUST equal extra/qk_modes.py Verdict (the run-verdict SSOT); enforced by test/unit/test_verdict_ssot.py. Old FAIL_WD/FAIL_REPRODUCIBILITY/NEEDS_BESPOKE_TEMPLATE were never emitted and were removed; the loop's template-gap concept is PRUNE_NEEDS_TEMPLATE in search_policy.prune_to_lifecycle_decision.

verdict_interpretation.PASS_PROMOTE: W==D clears >=5%@1024 or >=7%@4096, no ctx512 regress >1%, within repro band -> eligible for an OWNER default decision (the evaluator never sets a default)
verdict_interpretation.PASS_OPT_IN: opt-in route (e.g. q8) clears its speed gate + quality (dNLL<=0.01); default stays off
verdict_interpretation.PASS_ORACLE_LOCAL_AB: reference oracle beats the comparator in local A/B -> a non-promotable target that informs codegen
verdict_interpretation.LOCAL_PASS_WD_FAIL: local A/B passed but whole-decode W==D below the promotion gate -> non-promotion (e.g. FLASH_L=64)
verdict_interpretation.FAIL_LOCAL_AB: local A/B below 1.05x vs the current winner gqa_coop_vec
verdict_interpretation.FAIL_ORACLE_LOCAL_AB: reference oracle does not beat the comparator in local A/B
verdict_interpretation.NEEDS_GPU_STATE_TOOLING: W==D auto-clock repeat band exceeds the promotion margin -> promotion cannot be trusted; needs GPU-state-control tooling
verdict_interpretation.SELFTEST_PASS: evaluator-binding plumbing selftest; no performance measured
verdict_interpretation.REST: baseline curve or no rung cleared a gate

promotion_rules.never: pinned-clock or PROFILE timing is never promotion authority; the evaluator never changes a default or flag
promotion_rules.noise: a delta within the measured reproducibility band is non-promotion

stop_conditions: W==D repeat variance > promotion margin -> NEEDS_GPU_STATE_TOOLING (write docs/decode-gpu-state-control-scope)
candidate needs bespoke glue -> NEEDS_BESPOKE_TEMPLATE (template layer first)
correctness cannot be made common -> PARTIAL_EVALUATOR_ONLY
